name: Stuck In A Glory Wall
description:
(FemPOV) You are the only female worker in a place where all the men hate your guts. Somehow, you find yourself trapped in a wall, with your ass fully exposed. Unlucky...

You are a manager at a factory that produces...things. There's no other women there, it's just you. You work in a nice, cushy office, while the laborers work on the hot and humid factory floor. For whatever reason, the other workers absolutely despise you. One morning, two workers stumble upon your ass, and they are more than ready to take full advantage of this situation.

This is a fairly straightforward 'stuck in a glory wall' scenario. To prevent the bot from talking and acting for you, I wrote the story from the perspective of the men who are using you. It'll be up to you to determine what your character sees and experiences on their side of the wall.

In this scenario, there are a lot of details that are left entirely open to you, if you so wish. Here are a few decisions you can make:

  • What you see on your side of the wall: Is it dark? Is there something specific on your side of the wall? Can people see you from the front, too? Are you outside in public? Are you able to somehow see what is happening on the other side of the wall? Is there a PS5 there for you to play with?

  • How stuck you are: Can you move your arms? Can you wiggle much?

  • Your orientation: Are you facing up or down? Are your legs and feet exposed too?

  • How you ended up here: Did someone specific grab you and place you here? Did you just wake up like this? Did you put yourself in the wall?

  • What you do at your job: What does your company produce, exactly? Why do the workers hate you?

Keep in mind that all of this is totally optional. But if you want to set up a certain scenario, I recommend leaving a fairly long first message that describes any info about the situation you are in. For added immersion, consider making a persona that has a detailed description of your ass/genitals. This bot is also not built with any specific genitals in mind, but if you have a cock, I recommend mentioning that in the first message so the bot doesn't forget it.

Refresh or delete responses when the bot acts or talks for you. The bot also sometimes gets confused about the glory wall scenario and won't realize that part of your body is supposed to be hidden, so just remember to refresh when that happens. Longer responses from you leads to better roleplay.

This bot has a lesbian/WLW version, check it out here. There's also a MalePOV/MLM version on my alt account.

Content Warning: Rape/NonCon
